scripts.check: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/data.js && node --check src/store.js && go build ./...
scripts.test:store: node --input-type=module -e 'const memory = new Map(); globalThis.localStorage = { getItem: (key) => memory.get(key) ?? null, setItem: (key, value) => memory.set(key, value), removeItem: (key) => memory.delete(key) }; const { createStore } = await import("./src/store.js"); const store = createStore(); store.dispatch({ type: "SELECT_CANDIDATE", index: 0 }); store.dispatch({ type: "COMPLETE_AD", kind: "answer" }); store.dispatch({ type: "UNLOCK_TRACK" }); const saved = JSON.parse(memory.get("streetmelody.appState.v1")); if (!saved.unlockedTrackIds.includes("track_lemon")) throw new Error("unlock not persisted"); if (!saved.collectedPieces.track_lemon.includes(1)) throw new Error("piece not persisted"); if (!saved.answerReadyTrackIds.includes("track_lemon")) throw new Error("answer readiness not persisted"); console.log("store persistence ok");'
